import { Observable } from '../Observable'; import { ObservableInput, ObservableInputTuple } from '../types'; import { Subscriber } from '../Subscriber'; export declare function race<T extends readonly unknown[]>(inputs: [...ObservableInputTuple<T>]): Observable<T[number]>; export declare function race<T extends readonly unknown[]>(...inputs: [...ObservableInputTuple<T>]): Observable<T[number]>; /** * An observable initializer function for both the static version and the * operator version of race. * @param sources The sources to race */ export declare function raceInit<T>(sources: ObservableInput<T>[]): (subscriber: Subscriber<T>) => void; //# sourceMappingURL=race.d.ts.map
